title: La meilleure part
writer: Yves Allégret, Jacques Sigurd, Philippe St-Gil
actors: Gérard Philipe, Michèle Cordoue, Umberto Spadaro
plot: Philippe Morin, a young engineer passionate about his work, leads the construction of a huge dam in the High Alps. Like all the men who work on the building site, he gives the best part of himself. Unfortunately, his health deteri...
